fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the G/L account that fixed asset expenses and costs are posted to when the fixed asset card contains this code.

fields.name: Acquisition Cost Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post acquisition cost for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Accum. Depreciation Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post accumulated depreciation to when you post depreciation for fixed assets.

fields.name: Write-Down Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post any write-downs for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Appreciation Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post appreciation transactions for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 1 Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post Custom-1 transactions for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 2 Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post Custom-2 transactions for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Acq. Cost Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post acquisition cost to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Accum. Depr. Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post accumulated depreciation to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Write-Down Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post write-downs of fixed assets to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Appreciation Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post appreciation to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 1 Account on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post Custom-1 transactions to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 2 Account on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post Custom-2 transactions to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Gains Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post any gains to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Losses Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post any losses to when you dispose of fixed assets in this posting group.

fields.name: Book Val. Acc. on Disp. (Gain)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account number you want the program to post assets' book value to when you dispose of fixed assets at a gain on book value.

fields.name: Sales Acc. on Disp. (Gain)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account number you want to post sales to when you dispose of fixed assets at a gain on book value.

fields.name: Write-Down Bal. Acc. on Disp.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post write-downs of fixed assets to when you dispose of fixed assets.

fields.name: Apprec. Bal. Acc. on Disp.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post appreciation transactions of fixed assets to when you dispose of fixed assets.

fields.name: Custom 1 Bal. Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post custom-1 transactions of fixed assets to when you dispose of fixed assets.

fields.name: Custom 2 Bal. Acc. on Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post custom-2 transactions of fixed assets to when you dispose of fixed assets.

fields.name: Maintenance Expense Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post maintenance expenses for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Maintenance Bal. Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post maintenance expenses for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Acquisition Cost Bal. Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post acquisition cost for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Depreciation Expense Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to post depreciation expense for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Write-Down Expense Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post write-downs for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Appreciation Bal. Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post appreciation for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 1 Expense Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post custom-1 transactions for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Custom 2 Expense Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number to post custom-2 transactions for fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Sales Bal. Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account to post sales when you dispose of fixed assets to in this posting group.

fields.name: Allocated Acquisition Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage of acquisition cost that can be allocated when acquisition cost is posted.

fields.name: Allocated Depreciation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage of depreciation that can be allocated when depreciation is posted.

fields.name: Allocated Write-Down %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for write-down transactions that can be allocated when write-down transactions are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Appreciation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for appreciation transactions that can be allocated when appreciation transactions are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Custom 1 %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for custom-1 transactions that can be allocated when custom-1 transactions are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Custom 2 %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for custom-2 transactions that can be allocated when custom-2 transactions are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Sales Price %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage of sales price that can be allocated when sales are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Maintenance %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for maintenance transactions that can be allocated when maintenance transactions are posted.

fields.name: Allocated Gain %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage of gains on fixed assets that can be allocated, when gains are involved in the disposal of fixed assets.

fields.name: Allocated Loss %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total percentage for losses on fixed assets that can be allocated when losses are involved in the disposal of fixed assets.

fields.name: Allocated Book Value % (Gain)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum that applies to book value gains.

fields.name: Allocated Book Value % (Loss)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum that applies to book value gains.

fields.name: Sales Acc. on Disp. (Loss)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account number to which you want to post sales, when you dispose of fixed assets at a loss on book value.

fields.name: Book Val. Acc. on Disp. (Loss)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account number to which to post assets' book value, when you dispose of fixed assets at a loss on book value.
